title: Tool Trims Concept
description: This mod introduces new trims for tools, allowing customization similar to armor. Now you can decorate your pickaxes, swords, and axes with unique patterns to match your playstyle. Explore the world of Minecraft, discover special smithing templates.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e85bfd5118a3655e141e7bf58f335aed75b7abb4.png)

## About mod:

This mod introduces new trims for tools, allowing customization similar to armor. Now you can decorate your pickaxes, swords, and axes with unique patterns to match your playstyle. Explore the world of Minecraft, discover special smithing templates, and give your tools a distinctive look!

The mod is still in development and is currently in its alpha version! Not all tools have their trim variants yet, but we're working on future updates. Expect new features and improvements in upcoming releases!


<details>
<summary>What's new?</summary>
  
- Added the ability to apply the "Heat" trim to netherite pickaxes


- Netherite pickaxes can be decorated with all decorative materials (Copper ingot/ Iron ingot/ Amethyst/ Gold Ingot/ Quartz/ Emerald/ Redstone Dust/ Lapis Lazuli/ Diamond/ Netherite)



![What's new?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65a971bcc2dd07dd26848e9e33674594e7681d43.png)






WARNING! This mod is still in development and currently only supports applying trims to netherite swords, netherite axes or netherite pickaxes. More tools will be added in future updates!
</details>

## Content:


<details>
<summary>Applying smithing templates</summary>
Templates can be applied to the tool (only the netherite sword, netherite axes or netherite pickaxes for now) in the smithing table by inserting: 
  smithing template -> tool -> mineral

![How?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e37a2cd0b8dbf5d5d755cb952642a36fbf1f6bf.png)

List of minerals that can be used:
- Netherite Ingot

- Diamond

- Emerald

- Redstone Dust

- Lapis Lazuli

- Gold Ingot

- Amethyst Shard

- Nether Quartz

- Iron Ingot

- Copper Ingot


</details>

### Smithing Templates:


<details>
<summary>"Heat" smithing template</summary>
This is a smithing template that can be found in the weaponsmith's house in all types of villages. There is a 1/3 chance of finding it in quantities of 1 to 2.

![Heat Smithing Template in inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e15b0bb52e3d20cdabba626e11dd63e6341e8b2.png)

**Template duplication recipe:**

![Heat Smithing Template Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/55ba40cf1851e885f1cfc3734b233a21dff60a80.png)

*Any type of planks can be used instead of oak planks
</details>

## Information:

Tool Trims Concept

**Mod for:** Minecraft Java

**Neoforge version:** 21.1.65 (Download here: https://projects.neoforged.net/neoforged/neoforge )
